headline: Session 36 made first-run onboarding honor the same readable premium theme contract as the rest of the game, then exhausted the live genius queue.

items.title: tutorial-theme-token-parity
items.evidence: Tutorial overlay/modal/choice CSS now uses shared theme tokens instead of hard-coded dark colors.

items.title: tutorial-light-readability-regression
items.evidence: Playwright creates a first-run light-mode league and verifies light surfaces, dark text, and contrast gap.
